title: argyrochosma limitanea
intro: Argyrochosma limitanea, also known as the Limite fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta, characterized by its frond-like leaves and reproductive structures. The medicinal properties of Argyrochosma limitanea include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it potentially useful in treating various health conditions. Argyrochosma limitanea is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system.
